message:
refactor(tests): restructure TestHarness API for machine-readable output

Refactor the TestHarness log dumping interface from a human-readable
stderr printer to a structured JSONL-returning API:

- dump_logs() now returns a String of JSONL instead of printing colored
  text to stderr, enabling test assertions and triage workflows to parse
  log output programmatically
- Add has_artifacts() and dump_artifact_index() convenience methods that
  delegate to the underlying logger, providing backwards compatibility
  for existing tests that check artifact state
- Add info() and info_ctx() proxy methods on TestHarness so tests can
  log structured messages without reaching into the logger directly
- Reformat a minor closure in e2e_artifact_retention_triage for rustfmt
  compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
